\tzpentry{ID4887}{Kinetic Term Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4887 introduces Kinetic Term Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\hat{K}_{ex} = -2 \sum_{i,j} J_{ij}(\ManifoldL) (\SpinOp_i \cdot \SpinOp_j) \otimes \exp\left( -\frac{r_{ij}}{\xi_{neural}} \right)\]
